queries.question: What is the terminal number of the Delta flight?
queries.sql: SELECT terminals.terminal_number FROM boarding_areas JOIN flights_boarding_areas ON flights_boarding_areas.boarding_area_id = boarding_areas.boarding_area_id JOIN flights ON flights.flight_id = flights_boarding_areas.flight_id JOIN terminals ON boarding_areas.terminal_number = terminals.terminal_number JOIN airlines ON airlines.airline_id = flights.airline_id WHERE airlines.name  = 'Delta'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?terminal_number WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?boarding_areas p:hasterminals ?terminals .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasairlines ?airlines .
  ?terminals p:terminal_number ?terminal_number .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Delta")
}

queries.question: Where can I find my flight from DFW to PHX?
queries.sql: SELECT terminals.terminal_number FROM boarding_areas JOIN flights_boarding_areas ON flights_boarding_areas.boarding_area_id = boarding_areas.boarding_area_id JOIN flights ON flights.flight_id = flights_boarding_areas.flight_id JOIN terminals ON boarding_areas.terminal_number = terminals.terminal_number WHERE flights.origin_airport_code  = 'DFW' AND flights.destination_airport_code  = 'PHX'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?terminal_number WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?boarding_areas p:hasterminals ?terminals .
  ?terminals p:terminal_number ?terminal_number .
  ?flights p:origin_airport_code ?origin_airport_code_f .
  ?flights p:destination_airport_code ?destination_airport_code_f .
  FILTER(STR(?origin_airport_code_f) = "DFW")
  FILTER(STR(?destination_airport_code_f) = "PHX")
}

queries.question: Where can I find my flight from DFW to PHX?
queries.sql: SELECT boarding_areas.gate  FROM boarding_areas JOIN flights_boarding_areas ON flights_boarding_areas.boarding_area_id = boarding_areas.boarding_area_id JOIN flights ON flights.flight_id = flights_boarding_areas.flight_id WHERE flights.origin_airport_code  = 'DFW' AND flights.destination_airport_code  = 'PHX'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?gate WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?boarding_areas p:gate ?gate .
  ?flights p:origin_airport_code ?origin_airport_code_f .
  ?flights p:destination_airport_code ?destination_airport_code_f .
  FILTER(STR(?origin_airport_code_f) = "DFW")
  FILTER(STR(?destination_airport_code_f) = "PHX")
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>

SELECT ?terminal_number ?gate WHERE {

  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?boarding_areas p:hasterminals ?terminals .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where can I find the Delta flight?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?terminal_number WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?boarding_areas p:hasterminals ?terminals .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasairlines ?airlines .
  ?terminals p:terminal_number ?terminal_number .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Delta")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?gate WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasairlines ?airlines .
  ?boarding_areas p:gate ?gate .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Delta")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?terminal_number ?gate WHERE {
  ?boarding_areas a :Boarding_Areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas a :flights_boarding_areas .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasboarding_areas ?boarding_areas .
  ?flights a :Flights .
  ?flights_boarding_areas p:hasflights ?flights .
  ?terminals a :Terminals .
  ?boarding_areas p:hasterminals ?terminals .
  ?airlines a :Airlines .
  ?flights p:hasairlines ?airlines .
  ?terminals p:terminal_number ?terminal_number .
  ?boarding_areas p:gate ?gate .
  ?airlines p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Delta")
} }
}
